task_completion.description: The agent opened the original draft document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open, displaying a document titled 'lab_report_draft.docx' containing a water quality lab report.

task_completion.description: The agent formatted numeric indices in chemical formulas using subscript.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Numbers in chemical formulas (e.g., the '2' and '4' in H2SO4, the '2' in CO2, the '3' in NO3-) appear smaller and slightly below the normal text line.

task_completion.description: The agent formatted ionic charges using superscript.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The charge indicators in ions (e.g., the '2+' in Ca2+, the '-' in NO3-) appear smaller and slightly above the normal text line.

task_completion.description: The agent formatted exponents in scientific notation using superscript.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exponents in scientific notation expressions (e.g., the '-3' in ×10-3) appear smaller and slightly above the normal text line.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the modified document as 'lab_report_formatted.docx' without overwriting the original.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the new filename 'lab_report_formatted.docx' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory, or the word processor title bar updating to show the new filename.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor to format the document rather than a terminal script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI word processor's formatting tools, such as selecting text and clicking subscript/superscript buttons.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's 'Save As' functionality rather than terminal commands to create the new file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog box is visible in the screenshots, or the application menu (File -> Save As) is being used.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a Python script (like python-docx) in the terminal to bypass manual GUI formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show Python scripts being written or executed to manipulate the .docx file directly.
